items.name: UHPS HM-09 HPS-O1 Protective Utility Helmet
items.description:
Full Set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=UHPS&Category=1&CreatorName=Nomino%20Heavy%20Industries&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

The Universal Hazard Protection System Hardsuit Mark 9 is NHI's 9th and most successful attempt to properly reverse engineer technology that was arguably beyond our comprehension. Built from the ground up by taking references of the original helmet and hardsuit core, the UHPS system aims to provide overall protection against a multitude of environmental hazards.

The Head Protection System is equipped with advanced filters, high resolution cameras, thermal imaging and anti-radiation padding fitted into a fireproof, corrosion-resistant exterior to protect against environmental hazards.

Not bulletproof.

Modeled and textured by: matthewthecowboy 

Visit Nomino Heavy Industries' Store page here: https://www.roblox.com/groups/16496578/Nomino-Heavy-Industries#!/store
